name: loop-harness
description: A stack-agnostic loop-engineering harness for any coding project (PowerShell/pwsh). /init-harness scaffolds the project layer and, if design docs already exist in docs/, distils VISION and STATE from them; otherwise it interviews you. /work-next drives one maker-then-checker cycle off the STATE.md queue. Ships session-context, a Bash/PowerShell deny-list guard, a Stop+SubagentStop gate on build/verify.ps1 with a real per-session round-trip cap and ledger logging, maker/checker/explorer/verifier sub-agents with real effort routing, and per-stack verify templates that fail loudly until wired. Agents are config, tools are code, nothing finishes without the gate. Includes harness-audit, claude-code-hook-facts, and verify-gate-authoring skills, and the fixes from a Fable-5-led review of this same harness.
